Easy.title: Two Sum
Easy.desc: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

Easy.title: Palindrome Number
Easy.desc: Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome, and false otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_palindrome(121) == True
assert is_palindrome(-121) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Reverse String
Easy.desc: Write a function that reverses a string.

Easy.title: Sum Array
Easy.desc: Return the sum of all elements in an array.

Easy.title: Find Maximum
Easy.desc: Return the largest number in the array.

Easy.title: Find Minimum
Easy.desc: Return the smallest number in the array.

Easy.title: Count Vowels
Easy.desc: Count the number of vowels (a,e,i,o,u) in a string.

Easy.title: Is Even
Easy.desc: Return True if n is even, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_even(4) == True
assert is_even(7) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Is Odd
Easy.desc: Return True if n is odd, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_odd(5) == True
assert is_odd(2) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Factorial
Easy.desc: Return the factorial of n.

Easy.title: Fibonacci
Easy.desc: Return the n-th Fibonacci number (n=0 returns 0, n=1 returns 1).

Easy.title: GCD
Easy.desc: Return the greatest common divisor of a and b.

Easy.title: Check Prime
Easy.desc: Return True if n is a prime number, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_prime(7) == True
assert is_prime(10) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Sum of Digits
Easy.desc: Return the sum of the digits of a positive integer n.

Easy.title: Reverse Digits
Easy.desc: Reverse the digits of a number. (Assume positive)

Easy.title: Count Set Bits
Easy.desc: Count the number of 1s in the binary representation of n.

Easy.title: FizzBuzz
Easy.desc: Return 'Fizz' if n is divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if both, else return str(n).

Easy.title: Leap Year
Easy.desc: Return True if year is a leap year, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_leap(2020) == True
assert is_leap(2021) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: String Length
Easy.desc: Return the length of the string without using the len() function directly (just write it, however).

Easy.title: Count Consonants
Easy.desc: Count consonants in a string (letters that are not vowels).

Easy.title: Square Root
Easy.desc: Return the integer part of the square root of n.

Easy.title: Power of Two
Easy.desc: Return True if n is a power of two, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_power_of_two(16) == True
assert is_power_of_two(14) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Remove Spaces
Easy.desc: Return the string with all spaces removed.
Easy.validation:
assert remove_spaces('a b c') == 'abc'
assert remove_spaces(' x ') == 'x'
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Anagram Check
Easy.desc: Return True if s1 is an anagram of s2.
Easy.validation:
assert is_anagram('listen', 'silent') == True
assert is_anagram('hello', 'world') == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Sort Array
Easy.desc: Return the array sorted in ascending order.

Easy.title: Remove Element
Easy.desc: Remove all occurrences of val from arr and return the new array.

Easy.title: First Element
Easy.desc: Return the first element of the array. If empty, return None.
Easy.validation:
assert first_element([5,2]) == 5
assert first_element([]) == None
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Last Element
Easy.desc: Return the last element of the array. If empty, return None.
Easy.validation:
assert last_element([5,2]) == 2
assert last_element([]) == None
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Average
Easy.desc: Return the average of the array of numbers. If empty, return 0.

Easy.title: List Intersection
Easy.desc: Return the common elements between two lists, sorted.

Easy.title: List Union
Easy.desc: Return all unique elements from two lists, sorted.

Easy.title: Celsius to Fahrenheit
Easy.desc: Convert Celsius temperature to Fahrenheit (F = C * 9/5 + 32).

Easy.title: Fahrenheit to Celsius
Easy.desc: Convert Fahrenheit to Celsius (C = (F - 32) * 5/9).

Easy.title: Multiply Elements
Easy.desc: Return the product of all elements in the array.

Easy.title: Count Occurrences
Easy.desc: Return the number of times target appears in arr.

Easy.title: Absolute Difference
Easy.desc: Return the absolute difference between a and b.

Easy.title: Is Divisible
Easy.desc: Return True if a is divisible by b, False otherwise.
Easy.validation:
assert is_divisible(10, 2) == True
assert is_divisible(10, 3) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: String to Int
Easy.desc: Convert string to integer.

Easy.title: Int to String
Easy.desc: Convert integer to string.

Easy.title: Swap Ends
Easy.desc: Swap the first and last elements of an array and return it.

Easy.title: Middle Element
Easy.desc: Return the middle element of an array. If even length, return the right middle.

Easy.title: All Unique
Easy.desc: Return True if all elements in the array are unique.
Easy.validation:
assert all_unique([1,2,3]) == True
assert all_unique([1,2,1]) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Contains Substring
Easy.desc: Return True if sub is present in s.
Easy.validation:
assert contains_sub('hello', 'ell') == True
assert contains_sub('hello', 'world') == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Nth Multiple
Easy.desc: Return the nth multiple of m.

Easy.title: Count Evens
Easy.desc: Return the number of even numbers in an array.

Easy.title: Count Odds
Easy.desc: Return the number of odd numbers in an array.

Easy.title: Is Empty
Easy.desc: Return True if the array/string is empty.
Easy.validation:
assert is_empty('') == True
assert is_empty([1]) == False
print("Passed")

Easy.title: Repeat String
Easy.desc: Return the string repeated n times.

Easy.title: Add One
Easy.desc: Add 1 to the given number.

Easy.title: Double
Easy.desc: Return the number multiplied by 2.

Medium.title: Reverse Int Overflow
Medium.desc: Reverse the digits of a signed integer. Return 0 if it overflows.

Medium.title: Group Anagrams
Medium.desc: Group an array of strings into anagrams.
Medium.validation:
assert sorted([sorted(x) for x in group_anagrams(['eat','tea','tan','ate','nat','bat'])]) == sorted([sorted(['eat','tea','ate']), sorted(['tan','nat']), sorted(['bat'])])
assert group_anagrams(['']) == [['']]
print("Passed")

Medium.title: Valid Parentheses
Medium.desc: Given a string of '()', '{}', '[]', return True if closed properly.
Medium.validation:
assert is_valid_brackets('()[]{}') == True
assert is_valid_brackets('([)]') == False
print("Passed")

Medium.title: Rotate Array
Medium.desc: Rotate an array to the right by k steps. Return the rotated array.

Medium.title: Find Peak Element
Medium.desc: Find a peak element in an array and return its index.

Medium.title: Sort Colors
Medium.desc: Given an array of 0s, 1s, and 2s, sort them in-place and return the array.

Medium.title: Kth Largest
Medium.desc: Find the kth largest element in an array.

Medium.title: Top K Frequent Elements
Medium.desc: Return the k most frequent elements in an array. Sorted in ascending order for the output.

Medium.title: Longest Unique Substring
Medium.desc: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

Medium.title: Container With Most Water
Medium.desc: Find two lines that together with x-axis form a container, such that the container contains the most water.

Medium.title: Spiral Matrix
Medium.desc: Given an m x n matrix, return all elements in spiral order.

Medium.title: Coin Change
Medium.desc: Return the fewest number of coins to make up an amount, or -1 if impossible.

Medium.title: Jump Game
Medium.desc: Return True if you can reach the last index of the array, False otherwise.
Medium.validation:
assert can_jump([2,3,1,1,4]) == True
assert can_jump([3,2,1,0,4]) == False
print("Passed")

Medium.title: Merge Intervals
Medium.desc: Merge all overlapping intervals. List of lists [start, end].

Medium.title: Search in Rotated Array
Medium.desc: Find target in a rotated sorted array. Return index or -1.

Medium.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
Medium.desc: Return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

Medium.title: House Robber
Medium.desc: Determine max money you can rob without robbing adjacent houses.

Medium.title: Word Break
Medium.desc: Return True if s can be segmented into a sequence of dictionary words.
Medium.validation:
assert word_break('leetcode', ['leet','code']) == True
assert word_break('catsandog', ['cats','dog','sand','and','cat']) == False
print("Passed")

Medium.title: Set Matrix Zeroes
Medium.desc: If an element is 0, set its entire row and column to 0. Return modified.

Medium.title: Permutations
Medium.desc: Return all possible permutations of an array of distinct integers.

Medium.title: Product Except Self
Medium.desc: Return answer where answer[i] is product of all elements except nums[i].

Medium.title: Find Duplicate Number
Medium.desc: Given an array of size n+1 with integers in [1,n], return the one repeated number.

Medium.title: Subarray Sum K
Medium.desc: Return the total number of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.

Medium.title: LRU End State
Medium.desc: Given queries (add item, return list), return the final state sorted.

Medium.title: Max Product Subarray
Medium.desc: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest product.

Hard.title: First Missing Positive
Hard.desc: Return the smallest missing positive integer in an unsorted array.

Hard.title: Trapping Rain Water
Hard.desc: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map, compute how much water it can trap.

Hard.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
Hard.desc: Return the median of the two sorted arrays.

Hard.title: Longest Valid Parentheses
Hard.desc: Find the length of the longest valid well-formed parentheses substring.

Hard.title: Wildcard Matching
Hard.desc: Implement wildcard pattern matching with '?' and '*'.
Hard.validation:
assert is_match('aa', 'a') == False
assert is_match('aa', '*') == True
print("Passed")

Hard.title: Jump Game II
Hard.desc: Return the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index.

Hard.title: N-Queens
Hard.desc: Return the number of distinct solutions to the n-queens puzzle.

Hard.title: Minimum Window Substring
Hard.desc: Return the min window substring of s such that every character in t is included.

Hard.title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
Hard.desc: Find the area of largest rectangle in the histogram.

Hard.title: Edit Distance
Hard.desc: Return min operations to convert word1 to word2.

Hard.title: Scramble String
Hard.desc: Determine if s2 is a scrambled string of s1.
Hard.validation:
assert is_scramble('great', 'rgeat') == True
assert is_scramble('abcde', 'caebd') == False
print("Passed")

Hard.title: Distinct Subsequences
Hard.desc: Return the number of distinct subsequences of s which equals t.

Hard.title: Word Ladder Length
Hard.desc: Return length of shortest transformation sequence.

Hard.title: Candy
Hard.desc: Return min candies to distribute based on ratings.

Hard.title: Sliding Window Maximum
Hard.desc: Return the max sliding window array of size k.

Hard.title: Find Min Rotated II
Hard.desc: Find min element in rotated array that may contain duplicates.

Hard.title: Dungeon Game
Hard.desc: Return knight's min initial health to rescue princess.

Hard.title: Max Points on a Line
Hard.desc: Given an array of points, return the maximum number of points on same line.

Hard.title: Regular Expression
Hard.desc: Implement regex matching with '.' and '*'.
Hard.validation:
assert is_regex_match('aa', 'a') == False
assert is_regex_match('ab', '.*') == True
print("Passed")

Hard.title: Merge k Sorted Lists
Hard.desc: Merge k sorted arrays into one sorted array.

Hard.title: Reverse Nodes in k-Group
Hard.desc: Reverse elements of array k at a time.

Hard.title: Substring with Concatenation
Hard.desc: Find starting indices of substrings that are a concatenation of all words.

Hard.title: Sudoku Valid Row
Hard.desc: Given an array of 9 strings, return True if valid sudoku row.

Hard.title: Largest Divisible Subset
Hard.desc: Find largest subset where every pair is mutually divisible (return its size).

Hard.title: Perfect Squares
Hard.desc: Return least number of perfect square numbers that sum to n.
